channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: D4vd Arrested for Alleged Murder of Celeste Rivas | Billboard News
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to our breaking news segment. We have some shocking updates in the music world. Rapper D4vd, known for his hit song "Romantic Homicide", has been arrested by the LAPD.
[Short music transition]
Host: According to reports, the 21-year-old singer was taken into custody on suspicion of murdering 13-year-old Celeste Rivas. Her body was found in the front trunk of a Tesla registered to D4vd back in September, months after she went missing from her home in Lake Elsinore, California in April 2024.
[Short pause]
Host: D4vd's attorneys have released a statement, saying they will "vigorously defend" his innocence, claiming that the evidence will show he did not cause Celeste's death. The LAPD has confirmed that D4vd is being held without bail, and his case will be presented to the District Attorney's office on Monday.
[Outro music plays]
Host: We'll continue to follow this developing story and bring you updates as more information becomes available. That's all for now. Thank you for tuning in.
